data.content:
Here's my analysis of all the legacy patterns found:

| # | Legacy Pattern | Modernization |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="...">` | Replace with `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Explicit `Microsoft.Common.props` import | Implicit in SDK-style |
| 3 | Explicit `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import | Implicit in SDK-style |
| 4 | Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks | All values are defaults — remove entirely |
| 5 | `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic` | Unnecessary / defaults in SDK-style |
| 6 | `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | Default for applicable project types |
| 7 | `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK-style auto-globs `**/*.cs` |
| 8 | `<Reference Include="System">` etc. | Framework refs are implicit |
| 9 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | SDK auto-generates from `<PropertyGroup>` metadata |
| 10 | `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | Becomes `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |

Now let me apply the modernization:

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and explain how to modernize them.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **Old-style `<Project>` element** with `ToolsVersion` and `xmlns` — SDK-style uses `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Explicit `Microsoft.Common.props` import** — handled automatically by SDK
3. **Explicit `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` import** — handled automatically by SDK
4. **Configuration/Platform property groups** (Debug/Release) — SDK defaults handle these; the values shown are all defaults


5. **ProjectGuid, FileAlignment, AutoGenerateBindingRedirects** — all unnecessary defaults in SDK-style
6. **Deterministic** — already true by default
7. **Explicit `<Compile>` items and framework assembly references** — SDK handles both through automatic globbing and implicit framework inclusion
8. **Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs** — auto-generated from project properties in SDK-style
9. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** →

Writing the modernized csproj...

data.content:
**Done.** The project went from 47 lines → 11 lines. Here's a summary of what changed:

- **`<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`** — replaces the old `ToolsVersion`/`xmlns` header and both `Import` elements
- **Removed Debug/Release PropertyGroups** — all values were defaults that SDK-style provides automatically
- **Removed `<Compile>` items** — SDK-style auto-globs all `*.cs` files
- **Removed `<Reference>` items** — framework assemblies are implicit for `net472`
- **Removed `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `OutputType`** — all unnecessary/defaulted
- **Removed `RootNamespace`/`AssemblyName`** — default to the project filename (`LegacyApp`)
- **Deleted `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — assembly metadata is now expressed as `<Version>`, `<Description>`, `<Company>`, and `<Copyright>` in the project file (auto-generated at build time)
